result.stdout:
Description:
  DataLens - Exploratory Data Analysis CLI

Usage:
  DataLens.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  profile <file>     Quick dataset profiling
  analyze <file>     Run full or selective analysis
  correlate <file>   Run correlation analysis
  importance <file>  Compute feature importance for a target column

commands.payload:
Description:
  DataLens - Exploratory Data Analysis CLI

Usage:
  DataLens.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  profile <file>     Quick dataset profiling
  analyze <file>     Run full or selective analysis
  correlate <file>   Run correlation analysis
  importance <file>  Compute feature importance for a target column

result.stdout:
Description:
  Run full or selective analysis

Usage:
  DataLens.CLI analyze <file> [options]

Arguments:
  <file>  Path to the data file (CSV, TSV, JSON)

Options:
  -f, --format <format>    Output format: table or json [default: table]
  -t, --target <target>    Target column for regression/feature importance
  -i, --include <include>  Comma-separated analyzer names to include (e.g., correlation,distribution)
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Compute feature importance for a target column

Usage:
  DataLens.CLI importance <file> [options]

Arguments:
  <file>  Path to the data file (CSV, TSV, JSON)

Options:
  -t, --target <target> (REQUIRED)  Target column (required)
  -f, --format <format>             Output format: table or json [default: table]
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information
